steps.title: Compare the table entries
steps.content:
The listed $y$-values must be greater than those boundary values. The table with $y$-values $20$, $33$, and $46$ works because
$$20>17$$
$$33>27$$
$$46>37$$

steps.title: Select the table
steps.content: Only that table makes every ordered pair satisfy the inequality. The answer is A.
